policy.assignment_closure: Every source logical name and runtime artifact is explicitly assigned; an unknown name is an error.
policy.source_code_domain: Original CADR character codes 000 through 177 octal.
policy.geometry: Unicode derivation changes encoding metadata only; advances, bearings, baselines, and bitmap rows remain unchanged.
policy.x_core_limit: All assignments are BMP scalars because X core font requests and bdftopcf are limited to 16-bit character indices.
policy.private_use_stability: Published PUA assignments are append-only and must never be reused for another character identity.

pinned-cadr-character-table.finding: Codes 000 through 177 octal are printing characters; 000-037 and 177 therefore cannot retain numerically equal Unicode C0 or DELETE values.

rfc734-stanford-its-character-set.title: SUPDUP Protocol
rfc734-stanford-its-character-set.finding: The historical table identifies the non-ASCII printing characters, including subset/superset, intersection/union, lozenge, logical operators, arrows, and integral.

pinned-alto-font-loader.finding: READ-AL-INTO-FONT-DESCRIPTOR stores each Alto character at its unchanged CH index from 000 through 177; it performs no System 46 character-table translation.

pinned-old-leftarrow-reader.finding: The reader documents raw 137 as underline with the older left-arrow identity, corroborating the historic positional remap.

unicode-17-ucd.title: Unicode Character Database 17.0.0
unicode-17-ucd.finding: Supplies the authoritative scalar values and immutable Unicode character names recorded by the explicit mapping.

cadr-solid-zero.label: CADR text repertoire with solid raw 000

gls7x9.label: GLS7X9 mixed text and symbol repertoire

vr20.label: 20VR text repertoire with low duplicate alphabet
